instance.name: Mastering the Game of Allyship — Book/Game
instance.targetDescription: An 8-spoke curriculum that teaches players the practice of allyship through emotional alchemy, role mastery, and quest design. The Book/Game spoke of the MTGOA Organization campaign.
instance.bigVision: Players practice allyship as a sustainable, joyful, skill-based practice specific to their gifts.

quests.title: Answer the Call
quests.description:
**You've already heard it.** That faint signal — the ache that says "this could be better." That's your first quest card. Answer the call by naming what brought you here.

**By move:** Wake Up — notice the call inside you. Clean Up — clear the resistance to admitting it. Grow Up — develop the courage to claim a player identity. Show Up — say yes to the game out loud.

moveApplications.wakeUp: Notice the signal that brought you to allyship work.
moveApplications.cleanUp: Clear the resistance, doubt, or fear that says you're not ready.
moveApplications.growUp: Develop the courage to claim 'I am a player in this game.'
moveApplications.showUp: Say yes out loud — to yourself, a witness, or the system.

quests.title: Know Your Charge
quests.description:
**Charge begins with contact.** Learn to notice the emotional charge moving through you — the twinge, the tightening, the zing. This is the fuel of all allyship moves.

**By move:** Wake Up — notice when charge arises. Clean Up — name the discomfort without bypassing. Grow Up — develop your charge vocabulary. Show Up — generate charge with a 'Notice the Glitch' move.

moveApplications.wakeUp: Notice when emotional charge arises in your body.
moveApplications.cleanUp: Name a discomfort without fleeing or fixing.
moveApplications.growUp: Develop the vocabulary to describe your inner weather.
moveApplications.showUp: Generate charge with a Notice the Glitch move.

quests.title: Compost the Shadow
quests.description:
**Shadow work is the engine.** Every moment you bypass grief, suppress anger, or tighten against fear, you leak energy. Composting the shadow returns presence that evasion cost — and converts it into fuel.

**By move:** Wake Up — see the part of you you've exiled. Clean Up — process a charged emotion through the 3-2-1 method. Grow Up — develop comfort with what you don't want to feel. Show Up — turn one shadow encounter into a quest seed.

moveApplications.wakeUp: See a part of yourself you've been avoiding.
moveApplications.cleanUp: Process a charged emotion via 3-2-1 or similar shadow practice.
moveApplications.growUp: Develop comfort with sitting in what you don't want to feel.
moveApplications.showUp: Turn one shadow encounter into a quest seed.

quests.title: Make Your Move
quests.description:
**Mastery begins with motion, not permission.** Your first move doesn't need to be brilliant — it just needs to be yours. A text. A question. A pause. A yes. The world changes a little when you make it.

**By move:** Wake Up — see what move is available right now. Clean Up — clear the perfectionism that demands the right move. Grow Up — develop willingness to be clumsy in public. Show Up — make a real move in your real life.

moveApplications.wakeUp: See what small move is available to you right now.
moveApplications.cleanUp: Clear the perfectionism that demands the perfect move.
moveApplications.growUp: Develop willingness to be clumsy in public.
moveApplications.showUp: Make a real move in your real life and report back.

quests.title: Choose Your Role
quests.description:
**Rookie, Ace, Veteran, Engineer, Leader.** These aren't levels — they're costumes. Pick one that fits where you are right now. The role focuses your energy and tells the story of how you'll show up.

**By move:** Wake Up — see which role you've been unconsciously playing. Clean Up — clear the role you've outgrown. Grow Up — try on a role that stretches you. Show Up — play a move from your chosen role's deck.

moveApplications.wakeUp: See which role you've been unconsciously playing.
moveApplications.cleanUp: Release the role that no longer serves.
moveApplications.growUp: Try on a role that stretches your current capacity.
moveApplications.showUp: Play a move from your chosen role's deck in real life.

quests.title: Find Your Superpower
quests.description:
**Without your superpower, you're Superman under a red sun — present but powerless.** Discover the unique form of ally magic only you can wield. This is your leverage point.

**By move:** Wake Up — see what gift others rely on you for. Clean Up — clear the false modesty hiding it. Grow Up — develop fluency in naming and offering your superpower. Show Up — wield your superpower in a real moment.

moveApplications.wakeUp: See the gift others already rely on you for.
moveApplications.cleanUp: Clear the false modesty hiding your gift.
moveApplications.growUp: Develop fluency in naming and offering your superpower.
moveApplications.showUp: Wield your superpower in a real moment of need.

quests.title: Complete a Quest
quests.description:
**Quests are the soul currency of this game.** Choose one quest, run the full arc — intake, action, reflection — and complete it. The completion is what builds you into someone who finishes.

**By move:** Wake Up — see which quest is calling you. Clean Up — clear what tries to abandon it midway. Grow Up — develop the muscle of finishing. Show Up — complete a quest from start to end.

moveApplications.wakeUp: See which quest is most alive for you right now.
moveApplications.cleanUp: Clear what tries to abandon the quest midway.
moveApplications.growUp: Develop the muscle of finishing what you start.
moveApplications.showUp: Complete a full quest arc — intake, action, reflection.

quests.title: Design the Game
quests.description:
**You are the Game Designer.** You've played enough to start creating. Design a quest, a ritual, or a mechanic for someone else. This is the move that turns players into co-creators of the world.

**By move:** Wake Up — see what others need that doesn't yet exist. Clean Up — clear the imposter syndrome about being a designer. Grow Up — develop game design instincts. Show Up — create one quest or ritual for another player.

moveApplications.wakeUp: See what others need that doesn't yet exist.
moveApplications.cleanUp: Clear the imposter syndrome about being a designer.
moveApplications.growUp: Develop game design instincts through small experiments.
moveApplications.showUp: Create one quest or ritual for another player to use.
